title: The White Moth
writer: Izola Forrester, Barbara La Marr, Albert S. Le Vino
actors: Barbara La Marr, Conway Tearle, Charles de Rochefort
plot: The White Moth is a 1924 silent film drama produced and directed by Maurice Tourneur and distributed by First National Pictures. Barbara La Marr was the female lead supported by young Ben Lyon. This film survives at the Library of...
